response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and leadership in open-source projects, but his experience lacks depth in C++ (a hard requirement) and large-scale cloud compute platforms. His technical breadth and mentorship are positives, but the role's core demands (C++, distributed systems, cloud architecture) are not fully met.
strengths: Proven leadership in open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and mentorship (workshops, talks).
Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with a focus on testability and UX.
Strong problem-solving skills and adaptability, evident in contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and dev tooling.
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience; only brief C/C++ work at National Instruments (6 months).
Limited exposure to large-scale cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at the scale specified.
Technical leadership experience is primarily in full-stack or open-source contexts, not cloud/DevOps mentorship.
